title: Owens MC
description: A Minecraft modpack for the students of Old Dominion University.
body:
Welcome to the Minecraft Modpack made for the _**Old Dominion University**_ community! This pack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with a selection of hand-picked mods and shaders. Whether you're a builder, explorer, or adventurer, this modpack has something for _everyone_!

**Features:**

**Mods:** A variety of mods to enhance gameplay, including improved crafting, new biomes, and advanced building tools.

**Resource Packs:** Custom textures and sounds that give Minecraft a fresh new look.

**Shaders:** Beautiful shaders that bring Minecraft’s world to life with realistic lighting and effects.

Made with ChatGPT lol
